title: Taxi Lozovac | TAXI Antonio
description: Taxi Lozovac: transfers at the Krka National Park entrance (Skradinski Buk), Krka day trips, and fixed airport runs to Split (€95). Book direct.
keywords: taxi lozovac, lozovac taxi, taxi to krka national park, lozovac krka entrance, taxi krka waterfalls, lozovac to split airport, lozovac to sibenik

schema.name: Taxi Lozovac
schema.description: Private taxi at Lozovac, the main Krka National Park entrance for the Skradinski Buk waterfalls: park day trips, excursions and fixed airport transfers.

itemListElement.name: Taxi Lozovac to Krka NP (Skradin entrance)

mainEntity.name: How far is Lozovac from the Krka entrance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Lozovac is the Krka National Park road entrance itself, so you are already at the gate for the Skradinski Buk waterfalls. I drop you right at the entrance.

mainEntity.name: Can you wait while I visit the park?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. I offer a private Krka day trip with waiting time included, so I bring you to the falls, wait while you explore at your own pace, and drive you back. See my day trips page.

mainEntity.name: Do you also go to the Skradin entrance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. A transfer to the Krka Skradin entrance, where you take the boat to the falls, is a fixed €25 per car.
